title: API Request with Authentication
scenario: Write a prompt to generate an API request for retrieving a list of products using a Bearer token. Ensure the output includes the API base URL, authentication token, and a clear description of the request.
constraints: Must include a clear description of the request

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the word count and formatting constraints.
Verify if the output includes the authentication token.
Evaluate if the output includes a clear description of the request.
